title: carduus onopordioides subsp. hajastanicus
intro: Carduus onopordioides subsp. hajastanicus, also known as the Hajastanian Cardoon thistle, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carduus onopordioides subsp. hajastanicus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Carduus onopordioides subsp. hajastanicus include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
